flows.name: Structured estimate (v2 sync)
flows.summary: Primary path: guarded pipeline returns validated EstimationResult JSON.

steps.summary: Client sends structured project brief; FastAPI validates Pydantic schema.
LLMPipeline runs input guardrails, optional cache lookup, and orchestrates provider call.
Deterministic and semantic input checks (injection, PII, domain, moderation placeholder).
When enabled, embed assessment surface and search Redis for similar prior estimates.
Select mode, load few-shot examples and Jinja prompts, render user message.
LiteLLM calls OpenAI then Anthropic on failure; structured JSON parsed and validated.
HTTPS request to OpenAI when first in LLM_PROVIDERS chain.
Confidence floor, leakage heuristics; may downgrade without 422.
Persist artifact when safe_to_cache and rollout allows (not log-only).
Assemble EstimationResponse with optional evaluate metadata.

guarantees: Enforced unsafe input returns HTTP 422 with audit_id
Structured output validated before success response
failureBehavior: Provider chain exhaustion may use static fallback when enabled
Out-of-domain may return degraded 200 with reason_code
Cache miss continues to live LLM call
observability: DEV_MODE exposes provider and usage fields
knownGaps: Gemini provider configured in settings but not in default chain factories

flows.name: Markdown estimate (v1)
flows.summary: Legacy synchronous path returning Markdown estimation text.

steps.summary: v1 router delegates to EstimationService markdown estimate.
CAG prompt with file examples; provider chain streaming or complete.
Returns Markdown string and usage metadata.

failureBehavior: HTTP errors mapped to safe EstimationError messages
knownGaps: v1 does not use full v2 guardrail pipeline

flows.name: Semantic cache lookup
flows.summary: Optional vector lookup before LLM call when semantic cache feature is active.
flows.trigger: v2 pipeline start with SEMANTIC_CACHE feature flags enabled.

steps.summary: OpenAI embeddings API produces query vector.
RediSearch KNN against indexed cache entries in bucket.
On score above threshold and not log-only, skip provider call.

failureBehavior: Miss or disabled continues to live LLM
knownGaps: Cache correctness depends on bucket and prompt version alignment

flows.name: Docker Compose local stack
flows.summary: Run API, web, Redis, and Redis Insight together for local demos.

steps.summary: Redis Stack starts with healthcheck on 6379.
API container waits for Redis and passes healthcheck on /health.
Web nginx serves built UI after API healthy.
User opens http://127.0.0.1:5175 and calls API on 8000.

failureBehavior: Missing .env keys fail at provider call time
knownGaps: Production deployment topology not defined in repo
